# CWE-89 safe variant: parameterized query with renamed ids
lang: go
file: CWE-89-renamed-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// HandleSearch looks up items with a bound parameter.
func HandleSearch(db *sql.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	userInput := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM items WHERE name = $1", userInput)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	_ = rows
}
